body.title: CC: tool commands should dispatch directly
body.result: CC: <tool> and CC: hot_reload <file> commands now dispatch directly to tool registry without triggering semantic parsing or LLM reasoning turns. Eliminates wasted inference on unrelated semantic matches. Gate added to main.py with 4 test cases; all 1856 tests pass. Commit 40a3d2f4.
body.description: Igor receives'CC: <tool>' should dispatch tool directly without memory search or LLM reasoning turn
